content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left ahead with the car positioned on the right side of the track, and the left turn continues prominently.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 77, target = (77 + 5) % 121 = 82
- Target WP82: x=1.6926, y=4.4749
- Car: x=1.9071, y=4.6491, heading=161.26°
- dy = 4.4749 - 4.6491 = -0.1742
- dx = 1.6926 - 1.9071 = -0.2145
- bearing = atan2(-0.1742, -0.2145) → both negative, third quadrant
- angle = atan(0.1742/0.2145) = atan(0.812) = 39.1°
- bearing = -(180° - 39.1°) = -140.9°
- delta = -140.9° - 161.26° = -302.16°, normalize: -302.16° + 360° = +57.84°
- |delta| ≈ 57.8°: sharp left, use steering_angle=+25°, speed=0.75

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves sharply left ahead with car right of center; delta of +57.8° to WP82 confirms sharp left correction needed, maintaining max left steering at low speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Delta 5-15° use ±5°; 15-30° use ±10 to ±15°; 30-50° use ±15 to ±20°; >50° use ±25°",
    "Near WP75-85, track curves sharply left — expect large positive delta, use max left steering",
    "Speed 0.75 needed for sharp turns (|delta|>50°)",
    "Car is right of center on this left curve section — strong left correction needed",
    "Heading near 161° corresponds to west-northwest travel on this section",
    "WP82 lookahead gives ~+58° delta at this section — sharp left curve continues",
    "Track continues curving left through WP77-85 section before straightening",
    "Car has been consistently right of center — maintain strong left steering through this section"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.053, 1.966, 1.907],
    "y": [4.616, 4.641, 4.649],
    "yaw": [157.39, 158.63, 161.26]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP82 at (1.693, 4.475): dy=-0.174, dx=-0.215, bearing=-140.9°, delta=+57.8° → sharp left, steer +25°",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": 25.0
}
```
